chain.thought: Explanation: Scanning adjacent periods for any identical values, only “deaths per year” is the same between two consecutive periods: 1995-2000 and 2000-2005 both have 194,000 deaths. Therefore, the period that had the same number as the previous period is 2000-2005.

judge_thought: Explanation: Scanning for any consecutive periods with identical values, the only match is in “deaths per year,” where 1995–2000 and 2000–2005 both show 194,000. Therefore, the period that had the same number as the previous period is 2000–2005.
